findings.keywords_citation: Avalo reported positive Phase 2 LOTUS trial results in HS; IL-17 is mentioned as a cytokine generated by IL-1β.
findings.summary: Avalo Therapeutics reported first quarter 2026 financial results and provided business updates, highlighting positive topline results from the Phase 2 LOTUS trial of abdakibart in moderate to severe hidradenitis suppurativa (HS).

findings.summary: AnaptysBio reported first quarter 2026 financial results and announced the completion of the spin-off of First Tracks Biotherapeutics, Inc. The company now focuses on managing financial collaborations for Jemperli and imsidolimab.
